responses.english: Outstanding! Your ball control is brilliant for your age. Keep playing with both feet every day!
responses.shona: Waita zvakanaka! Kubata bhora kwako kwakanaka zvikuru. Ramba uchidiridzira nemakumbo maviri zuva nezuva!

responses.english: Amazing work! You touched the ball so many times with great control. You are a natural!
responses.shona: Basa rakanaka! Wakabata bhora kangani zvikuru nehunyanzvi. Uri munhu ane hukama nebhora!

responses.english: Excellent! Your feet moved so well with the ball. Keep smiling and keep playing!
responses.shona: Zvakanaka! Makumbo ako akafamba zvakanaka nebhora. Ramba uchiseka uye uchitamba!

responses.english: Good effort! You are learning fast. Try to use your other foot a little more next time.
responses.shona: Basa rakanaka! Uri kudzidza nekukurumidza. Edza kushandisa rimwe gumbo pane imwe nguva.

responses.english: Well done! Your strong foot is working great. Now let us train your other foot too!
responses.shona: Waita zvakanaka! Gumbo rako rine simba rinoshanda zvakanaka. Zvino ngatidzidzise rimwe gumbo rako!

responses.english: Nice work! Keep practicing every day and you will get even better very soon.
responses.shona: Basa rakanaka! Ramba uchiita magumo zuva nezuva uye uchakura zvikuru nokukurumidza.

responses.english: Keep trying! Every great player started just like you. Practice makes perfect — try again!
responses.shona: Ramba uchiedza! Mutambi wese mukuru akatanga saiwe. Kudzidzira kunoita kuti uve nhubu — edza zvakare!

responses.english: Do not give up! The ball is your friend. Spend 10 minutes with it every day and watch how fast you improve.
responses.shona: Usape! Bhora ndeshamwari yako. Pedza maminitsi gumi naro zuva nezuva uye tarisa kukurumidza kwaunosimuka.

responses.english: Good try! Focus on keeping the ball close to your feet. Slow and steady first, then fast!
responses.shona: Waedza zvakanaka! Tarisa kuchengeta bhora padyo nemakumbo ako. Nyore uye akasimba kutanga, wobva wakurumidza!

responses.english: Excellent technique! Your first touch is clean and your body shape is spot on. You are ready for the next level.
responses.shona: Hunyanzvi hwakanaka! Kubata kwako kwokutanga kwakanaka uye chimiro chemuviri wako chakanaka. Uri kugadzirika kwechikepe chekuteedzera.

responses.english: Outstanding session! Both feet working well, good balance, strong decision making. Scouts would be impressed.
responses.shona: Nguva yakanaka zvikuru! Makumbo maviri ashanda zvakanaka, kuenzana kwakanaka, kusarudza kwakasimba. Vaongorori vangafara.

responses.english: Brilliant work! Your technique under pressure stayed clean. That is a sign of a real footballer.
responses.shona: Basa rakanaka zvikuru! Hunyanzvi hwako pasi pemhinduro hwakasara hwakanaka. Icho chiratidzo chemutambi webhora wechokwadi.

responses.english: Good session! Your strong foot is excellent. Your weak foot needs 15 more minutes of work daily to catch up.
responses.shona: Nguva yakanaka! Gumbo rako rine simba rakanaka zvikuru. Gumbo rako risina simba rinoda maminitsi gumi nemashanu emagumo zuva nezuva kuti rikwane.

responses.english: Well done! Your passing accuracy is improving. Focus on your body shape before you receive the ball.
responses.shona: Waita zvakanaka! Chokwadi chekupfuura kwako chiri kusimba. Tarisa chimiro chemuviri wako usati wagamuchira bhora.

responses.english: Solid work! Your speed with the ball is good. Work on your first touch — it will make everything faster.
responses.shona: Basa rakasimba! Mwero wako nebhora wakanaka. Shanda pakubata kwako kwokutanga — kuchagadzira zvose kukurumidza.

responses.english: Keep working! Your technique needs more repetition. Do this drill every day for one week and you will see a big difference.
responses.shona: Ramba uchishanda! Hunyanzvi hwako hunoda kuita zvakawanda. Ita magumo aya zuva nezuva kwevhiki rimwe uye uchaona musiyano mukuru.

responses.english: Do not be discouraged! Your body position needs adjustment. Watch how you stand before touching the ball.
responses.shona: Usanyadzirwe! Chimiro chemuviri wako chinoda kugadzirwa. Tarisa mumiro wako usati watambira bhora.

responses.english: Slow down and focus on quality first. One clean touch is better than five messy ones.
responses.shona: Nonoka uye tarisa kunaka kwokutanga. Kubata kumwe kwakanaka kunopfuura kubata kushanu kusina kunaka.

responses.english: Elite level technique! Your execution under pressure is professional quality. ZIFA scouts should see this.
responses.shona: Hunyanzvi hwevhu repamusoro! Kushanda kwako pasi pemhinduro ndicho hunhu hwemutambi wenhengo. Vaongorori veZIFA vanofanira kuona izvi.

responses.english: Exceptional session! Both feet at high level, body shape perfect, decision speed excellent. You are performing like a professional.
responses.shona: Nguva yakanakisisa! Makumbo maviri epakoma, chimiro chemuviri chakanaka, mwero wekusarudza wakanaka. Uri kuita semutambi wepasuru.

responses.english: Outstanding! Your weak foot has caught up to your strong foot. This is exactly what coaches look for at the next level.
responses.shona: Zvakanaka zvikuru! Gumbo rako risina simba rakakwana regumbo rako rine simba. Ichi ndichowo chinotsvagwa nevadzidzisi pachikepe chinotevera.

responses.english: Good performance! At this level, the difference between good and great is your weak foot. Dedicate 20 minutes daily to it.
responses.shona: Kushanda kwakanaka! Pachikero ichi, musiyano pakati pekanaka nekubvira kunaka ndicho gumbo rako risina simba. Ipa maminitsi makumi maviri zuva nezuva.

responses.english: Solid session! Your technical base is strong. Work on executing the same quality when fatigued in the last 20 minutes of a match.
responses.shona: Nguva yakasimba! Hwaro hwako hwenyanzvi hwakasimba. Shanda pakuita hunhu humwechete iwe waneta mumaminitsi makumi maviri ekupedzisira emutambo.

responses.english: Well done! Your 1v1 skills are sharp. Add more disguise to your movement to make defenders read you less easily.
responses.shona: Waita zvakanaka! Hunyanzvi hwako hwekutamba nomumwe nechete hwakachenjera. Wedzera kuhwanda kumashure kwekufamba kwako kuti vadziviriri vakuverenge zvishoma.

responses.english: At this level, consistency is everything. Your technique breaks down under pressure. Train specifically in pressure situations daily.
responses.shona: Pachikero ichi, kuenderana ndiko kose. Hunyanzvi hwako hunopamhidzika pasi pemhinduro. Dzidzira zvakanyanya mumamiriro emhinduro zuva nezuva.

responses.english: The foundation is there but needs sharpening. Focus on your weaker areas with deliberate practice every session.
responses.shona: Hwaro huripo asi hunoda kusimbidzwa. Tarisa kunzvimbo dzako dzisina simba nekudzidzira kwakagadziridzwa muhuroro hwose.

responses.english: Trust the process. Identify your three weakest technical areas and spend 10 minutes on each one every day.
responses.shona: Vimba nenzira. Ona nzvimbo dzako nhatu dzisina simba dzenyanzvi uye pedzera maminitsi gumi pane imwe neimwe zuva nezuva.

responses.english: Professional standard execution. Your technical consistency across both feet at match intensity is elite. Keep this standard every session.
responses.shona: Kushanda kwemutambi wenhengo. Kuenderana kwako kwenyanzvi pamakumbo maviri pamwero wemutambo ndekhwe. Chengeta chinhu ichi muhuroro hwose.

responses.english: Exceptional. Your technical quality under match pressure is what separates professionals from the rest. Document this session for scouts.
responses.shona: Zvakanaka zvikuru. Hunhu hwako hwenyanzvi pasi pemhinduro yemutambo ndiko kunosiyanisa vaprofesheni nevamwe. Nyora huroro uhwu kune vaongorori.

responses.english: Good professional standard. Marginal gains now make the difference. Focus on your touch quality in tight spaces.
responses.shona: Chinhu chakanaka chemutambi wenhengo. Kuwana zvishoma zvishoma zvino knoita musiyano. Tarisa hunhu hwekubata kwako munzvimbo dzinosimba.

responses.english: Solid session. At professional level, 1 percent improvements compound over time. Identify your weakest technical moment today and drill it.
responses.shona: Huroro hwakasimba. Pachikero cheprofesheni, kusimuka kwepasendi rimwe kunowedzera nekufamba kwenguva. Ona nguva yako yakaipa munyanzvi nhasi uye idzidzire.

responses.english: Below professional standard today. Analyse what broke down technically and target it specifically in your next three sessions.
responses.shona: Pasi pechinhu chemutambi wenhengo nhasi. Ongorora zvakaregedza kunyanzvi uye zvitarise zvakanyanya muhuroro hwako hwematatu hunouya.

responses.english: You are so fast and strong for your age! Your body moves beautifully. Keep running and playing every day!
responses.shona: Uri nekukurumidza uye nesimba zvikuru pakoreji yako! Muviri wako unofamba zvakanaka. Ramba uchimhanya uye uchitamba zuva nezuva!

responses.english: Incredible energy! You never stopped moving. That energy will take you very far in football!
responses.shona: Simba rinoshamisa! Hauna kumira kufamba. Simba iroro richakuendesa kure zvikuru mubhora!

responses.english: Great effort! Your speed is good. To get even faster, practice sprinting to a tree and back every morning.
responses.shona: Kushanda kwakanaka! Mwero wako wakanaka. Kuti ukurumidze zvikuru, dzidzira kumhanya kusvika kumuti uye kudzoka mangwanani ose.

responses.english: Well done! Your stamina kept up well. Eat sweet potato before training to give you more energy.
responses.shona: Waita zvakanaka! Kusimba kwako kwakamira zvakanaka. Dya mbambaira usati wadzidza kukupa simba rakawanda.

responses.english: Keep moving every day! Run to school instead of walking when you can. Your fitness will build up quickly!
responses.shona: Ramba uchifamba zuva nezuva! Mhanya kuenda kuchikoro panzvimbo yokufamba iwe unogona. Simba rako richakura nekukurumidza!

responses.english: Do not worry about speed yet — just enjoy moving your body. Play tag with friends every day and your fitness will grow!
responses.shona: Usafunganya nezvemwero ikozvino — ingofara kufamba nemuviri wako. Tamba nhodo neshamwari zuva nezuva uye simba rako richakura!

responses.english: Excellent physical performance! Your sprint speed and recovery time are above average for your age group. Keep this training consistency.
responses.shona: Kushanda kwomuviri kwakanaka! Mwero wako wekumhanya nekupora kwenguva ari pamusoro pemwero wechikepe chako cherekoreji. Ramba uchishanda zvakaenzana.

responses.english: Outstanding athleticism! Your acceleration in the first 5 metres is explosive. This is a huge advantage on the pitch.
responses.shona: Usimba hwakasiyana! Kukurumidza kwako mumita shanu dzokutanga kunoputika. Uyu ndiwo mubatsiro mukuru pamutambo.

responses.english: Good physical base! Your stamina is solid but your sprint speed can improve. Add 3 short sprints at the end of every training session.
responses.shona: Hwaro hwakanaka hwomuviri! Kusimba kwako kwakasimba asi mwero wako wekumhanya unogona kusimba. Wedzera kumhanya katatu kukupera kwehuroro hwose hwekudzidzira.

responses.english: Well done! Your fitness stayed consistent throughout. To improve, eat beans or eggs after training for muscle recovery.
responses.shona: Waita zvakanaka! Simba rako rakagara rakaenzana. Kusimudzira, dya nyemba kana mazai mushure mekudzidzira kugadzirisa masuru.

responses.english: Your fitness needs work but it will come. Run for 20 minutes every morning before school. In one month you will feel the difference.
responses.shona: Simba rako rinoda kushanda asi richauya. Mhanya maminitsi makumi maviri mangwanani ose usati waenda kuchikoro. Mumwedzi umwe uchanzwa musiyano.

responses.english: Do not be discouraged — fitness takes time to build. Focus on eating well — sadza with beans gives you great energy for training.
responses.shona: Usanyadzirwe — simba rinoda nguva kukura. Tarisa kudya zvakanaka — sadza nenyemba inokupa simba rakanaka rekudzidzira.

responses.english: Elite physical performance! Your speed zones show you can sustain high intensity for the full session. Scouts look for exactly this.
responses.shona: Kushanda kwomuviri kwepakoma! Nzvimbo dzako dzemwero dzinoratidza kuti unogona kugarisa mwero murefu muhuroro hwose. Vaongorori vanotsvaga chokwadi ichi.

responses.english: Exceptional athleticism at this level! Your sprint count and recovery speed put you in the top tier for your age group.
responses.shona: Usimba hwakasiyana pachikero ichi! Nhamba yako yekumhanya uye mwero wokupora zvakuisa muchikamu chepamusoro chechikepe chako.

responses.english: Solid physical session! To reach elite level, your sprint recovery needs to be under 30 seconds consistently. Track this every session.
responses.shona: Huroro hwomuviri hwakasimba! Kusvika pachikero chepamusoro, kupora kwako kwekumhanya kunofanira kuva pasi pesekendi makumi matatu zvakaenzana. Ongorora izvi muhuroro hwose.

responses.english: Good stamina and speed! Your physical profile is strong. Now add position-specific conditioning to sharpen your match fitness.
responses.shona: Kusimba uye mwero wakanaka! Chimiro chako chomuviri chakasimba. Zvino wedzera kudzidzirwa kwenzvimbo yako yechokwadi kusimbisa simba rako remutambo.

responses.english: Your physical output dropped significantly in the second half of the session. Focus on match fitness training and nutrition before sessions.
responses.shona: Kushanda kwako kwomuviri kwakaderuka zvikuru muhafu yechipiri yehuroro. Tarisa kudzidzira kwesimba remutambo uye kudya usati waita huroro.

responses.english: Professional physical standard. Your load management and intensity output are exactly where they need to be for match performance.
responses.shona: Chinhu chomuviri chemutambi wenhengo. Kubata kwako kwemutoro uye kushanda kwemwero zviri pachiri panofanira kuva nemutambo.

responses.english: Good professional output. Monitor your load carefully — recovery at this level is as important as the training itself.
responses.shona: Kushanda kwakanaka kwemutambi wenhengo. Ona mutoro wako zvakangwara — kupora pachikero ichi kunokosha zvakafanana nekudzidzira pacharo.

responses.english: Physical output below professional standard today. Review your sleep, nutrition and training load from the past week.
responses.shona: Kushanda kwomuviri pasi pechinhu chemutambi wenhengo nhasi. Ongorora hope dzako, kudya uye mutoro wekudzidzira wevhiki rapfuura.

responses.english: You understood where to go so well! You found the open spaces perfectly. That is very smart football!
responses.shona: Wakunzwisisa zvakanaka kwekuenda! Wakawana nzvimbo dzakavhurika zvakanaka. Iri bhora rine njere zvikuru!

responses.english: Good thinking on the pitch! You found some good spaces. Keep looking around you before you get the ball.
responses.shona: Kufunga kwakanaka pamutambo! Wakawana nzvimbo dzakanaka. Ramba uchitarisa-tarisa nekukurumidza usati wabata bhora.

responses.english: Keep looking around the pitch! Before you get the ball, look left and right to see where your friends are.
responses.shona: Ramba uchitarisa-tarisa pamutambo! Usati wabata bhora, tarisa kuruboshwe uye kurudyi kuona shamwari dzako dziriko.

responses.english: Excellent tactical awareness! Your movement off the ball created great passing options for your teammates. A real team player.
responses.shona: Njere dzepamusoro dzepamutambo! Kufamba kwako kubva pabhora kwakagadzira nzira dzakanaka dzekupfuura kune vamwe vako. Mutambi wechokwadi wesepuka.

responses.english: Good tactical play! You understand position well. Work on scanning the pitch more often — look up every 3 seconds.
responses.shona: Kutamba zvakanaka pamutambo! Unonzwisisa nzvimbo zvakanaka. Shanda kuongorora mutambo kakawanda — tarisa kumusoro masekendi matatu ose.

responses.english: Positioning needs work. Remember — good positioning means getting open before the ball arrives, not after.
responses.shona: Nzvimbo inoda kushanda. Rangarira — nzvimbo yakanaka kureva kuwana yakavhurwa bhora risati rasvika, kwete mushure.

responses.english: Elite tactical intelligence! Your pressing triggers, positioning and transition speed are all at a high level. Ready for higher competition.
responses.shona: Njere dzepamusoro dzepamutambo! Zvimutsa zvako zvekumanikidza, nzvimbo uye mwero wekuchinja zvose zviri pachikero chepamusoro. Wakagadzirira makwikwi epamusoro.

responses.english: Good tactical understanding! Your decision making is solid but slow under pressure. Practice quick decisions in rondo every session.
responses.shona: Kunzwisisa kwakanaka kwepamutambo! Kusarudza kwako kwakasimba asi kunononoka pasi pemhinduro. Dzidzira kusarudza nekukurumidza murondo muhuroro hwose.

responses.english: Tactical awareness needs significant improvement. Study your position specifically — watch how professional players in your position move without the ball.
responses.shona: Njere dzepamutambo dzinoda kusimbidzwa zvikuru. Ongorora nzvimbo yako zvakanyanya — tarisa vaprofesheni vanofamba sei pasina bhora munzvimbo yako.

responses.english: Professional tactical execution. Your game model understanding and implementation are at the level required for professional football.
responses.shona: Kushanda kwenjere dzepamutambo kwemutambi wenhengo. Kunzwisisa kwako kwemodeli yemutambo uye kushandisa zviri pachikero chinodiwa mubhora raprofesheni.

responses.english: Solid tactical session. Review the moments where your positioning was off and understand the game model principle behind each one.
responses.shona: Huroro hwakasimba hwenjere dzepamutambo. Ongorora nguva dzakarasika nzvimbo yako uye nzwisisa mhedzisiro yemodeli yemutambo shure kwega wega.

responses.english: Tactical output below required standard. Study the team game model and identify specifically where your role breaks down.
responses.shona: Kushanda kwenjere dzepamutambo pasi pechinhu chinodiwa. Ongorora modeli yemutambo wesepuka uye ona zvakanyanya nzvimbo inorasika basa rako.

responses.english: You never gave up and you kept smiling! That is the most important thing in football. You have the heart of a champion!
responses.shona: Hauna kupa uye wakaramba uchiseka! Ndiko kunonyanya kukosha mubhora. Une moyo wamukundi!

responses.english: Great attitude today! You tried again after making mistakes. That is exactly what champions do. Keep that spirit!
responses.shona: Mwoyo wakanaka nhasi! Wakaedza zvakare mushure mekukanganisa. Ndozvakaitwa nevakundi. Chengeta mwoyo uwoyo!

responses.english: It is okay to find things hard! Every player you admire found it hard too. The secret is to keep trying. You can do this!
responses.shona: Zvakanaka kuwana zvinhu zvakaoma! Mutambi wose waunofarira akawana zvakaoma zvakare. Chakavanzika ndechokuramba uchiedza. Unogona kuita izvi!

responses.english: Outstanding mental strength! You pushed through fatigue and kept your performance level high. This mental toughness will take you far.
responses.shona: Simba repamusoro remwoyo! Wakapfuura kuneta uye ukachengeta mwero wako wekushanda wakakwirira. Kusimba kwemwoyo kwokudarika kukuendesa kure.

responses.english: Good mental approach! You recovered well from mistakes. Work on maintaining focus for the full session without dropping intensity.
responses.shona: Mwoyo wakanaka! Wakapora zvakanaka pashure pekukanganisa. Shanda kuchengeta kutarisa muhuroro hwose pasina kuderuka kwemwero.

responses.english: Your confidence dropped after the first mistake. Remember — mistakes are how you learn. Next time you make a mistake, say out loud: I will do better!
responses.shona: Kutenda kwako kwakaderera mushure mekanganiso rokutanga. Rangarira — zvikanganiso ndizvo zvinokufundisa. Pane nguva inotevera unokanganisa, taura pachena: Ndichaita zvakanaka!

responses.english: Elite mental performance! Your composure under pressure and leadership on the pitch are qualities that scouts specifically look for.
responses.shona: Kushanda kwemwoyo kwepakoma! Kuturika kwako pasi pemhinduro uye hutungamiriri hwako pamutambo zvinhu zvakanyanya zvinotsvagwa nevaongorori.

responses.english: Strong mental session! Work on your pre-performance routine — a consistent warm up ritual will help you reach peak mental state faster.
responses.shona: Huroro hwakasimba hwemwoyo! Shanda pamaitiro ako ekutanga — chiitiko chakaenzana chekupisa muviri chichakubatsira kusvika pamwero wepamusoro wemwoyo nekukurumidza.

responses.english: Mental performance needs attention. Develop a pre-training mindset routine. Speak with your coach about mental preparation strategies.
responses.shona: Kushanda kwemwoyo kunoda kutariswa. Gadzira maitiro emwoyo ekutanga kwekudzidzira. Taura nomudzidzisi wako nezvenzira dzekugadzirira mwoyo.

responses.english: Professional mental standard. Your psychological resilience and performance consistency under all conditions is exactly what professional football demands.
responses.shona: Chinhu chemwoyo chemutambi wenhengo. Kusimba kwako kwemwoyo uye kuenderana kwekushanda pasi pezvinhu zvose ndicho chokwadi chinodiwa nebhora raprofesheni.

responses.english: Good professional mental output. Review your focus points and ensure your pre-match preparation is locked in for the next fixture.
responses.shona: Kushanda kwakanaka kwemwoyo kwemutambi wenhengo. Ongorora mapoinzi ako okutarisa uye ita shuwa kuti kugadzirira kwako kwemutambo kwakachengetwa kumutambo unotevera.

responses.english: Mental performance below professional standard. This is a priority area. Consider working with a sports psychologist to develop your mental game.
responses.shona: Kushanda kwemwoyo pasi pechinhu chemutambi wenhengo. Iyi nzvimbo inokosha. Funga kushanda nomuongorori wesimba remutambo kugadzira mutambo wemwoyo wako.

session_start.english: Camera is ready. Let us see what you can do today!
Tracking started. Give it everything you have!
Your session has begun. Focus and enjoy!
session_start.shona: Huroro hwako hwatanga. Tarisa uye ufare!

session_end.english: Great work today! Your data has been saved automatically.
session_end.shona: Basa rakanaka nhasi! Zvikamu zvako zvakachengetwa otomatiki.

session_end.english: Session complete! Check your report below.
session_end.shona: Huroro hwapera! Tarisa ripoti rako pasi.

no_person_detected.english: Point the camera at the player. Make sure the whole body is visible.
no_person_detected.shona: Rondedza kamera kumutambi. Ita shuwa muviri wose unoonekan.

poor_lighting.english: Lighting is too dark. Move to a brighter area for best results.
poor_lighting.shona: Chiedza chiri gotsi. Famba kunzvimbo yakajeka zvakawanda kuti uwane mhedzisiro yakanaka.
